title: Sanji and Zoro Reach Their Limits
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Big Mom, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Killer, Unknown person #8 as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What the hell?! stop being dead weight!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: gyaaa a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is no freaking headache, what's going on?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've finally got an opportunity to take down an emperor...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I die like this, my life as a pirate would be a joke....!!

dialogue.speaker: Killer
dialogue.text: Maaaaa Amamama!! Hahaha!! This is pitiful, kid!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Like you'll keel over on your own at this point!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to think you actually ate a smile fruit...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You really have the worst luck, Killer!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why can't we help you finish him, killer-san?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He keeps bashing his skull against that pillar, is he nuts?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: FAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFA. Just shut up and do what you're told...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The fire's almost here!! We need to hurry and leave before it's too late!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "You can have my life if that's what it takes!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 44 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
